```{r setup-pwm-null-models, eval = FALSE}
pwms_5mer <- lapply(1:10000, function(i) generate_random_pwm(5))
pwms_9mer <- lapply(1:10000, function(i) generate_random_pwm(9))

pwms <- c(pwms_5mer, pwms_9mer)
pwm_names <- c(
  paste0("rand5_", 1:10000),
  paste0("rand9_", 1:10000)
)

for (i in seq_along(proteases)) {
  df_merops <- read.csv( paste0(combined[i], "_merops_mapped.csv"), stringsAsFactors = FALSE, skip = 1 ) %>%   transmute(uniprot, substrate, pos = P1_position, cleavage_type = cleavage_type, is_merops = TRUE) 
  df_merops <- df_merops %>% group_by(uniprot, pos) %>% summarise(substrate     = dplyr::first(substrate),cleavage_type = paste(sort(unique(cleavage_type)), collapse = "/"), is_merops = TRUE,.groups = "drop")
  
df_pwm_scores <- score_merops_pwms_fast(
  df_merops = df_merops,
  pwms = pwms,
  pwm_names = pwm_names
)
  write.csv(df_pwm_scores,paste0(combined[i], "_merops_random_pwm_scores_5mer_9mer.csv"),row.names = FALSE) #_9mer
}
```

We compared the performance of these 10,000 random PWMs in scoring individual proteins, and all cleaved proteins for a protease (mean PWM score).

Compare phage-derived PWM mean scores on MEROPS sites against 10,000 random PWMs and label empirical percentiles (Appendix S10):

```{r plot-pwm-null-validation}
for (i in seq_along(proteases)) {
  dir_in <- paste0("F:/Alphafold Phage Project/", combined[i])
  df_raw <- read.csv( paste0(dir_in, "/", combined[i], "_all_cut_scores.csv"), stringsAsFactors = FALSE )
  df_z <- read.csv( paste0(dir_in, "/", combined[i], "_all_cut_scores_z.csv"), stringsAsFactors = FALSE )
  df_01 <- read.csv( paste0(dir_in, "/", combined[i], "_all_cut_scores_01.csv"), stringsAsFactors = FALSE )
  df_merops <- read.csv( paste0(combined[i], "_merops_mapped.csv"), stringsAsFactors = FALSE, skip = 1 ) %>%   transmute(uniprot, substrate, pos = P1_position, cleavage_type = cleavage_type, is_merops = TRUE) 
  df_merops <- df_merops %>% group_by(uniprot, pos) %>% summarise(substrate     = dplyr::first(substrate),cleavage_type = paste(sort(unique(cleavage_type)), collapse = "/"), is_merops = TRUE,.groups = "drop")
  df_model <- prep_model_df(df_raw, df_z, df_01, df_cutsite, df_merops)
  df_pwm_scores <- read.csv( paste0(combined[i], "_merops_random_pwm_scores_5mer_9mer.csv"), stringsAsFactors = FALSE )
  
  sp_table <- df_merops %>% distinct(uniprot) %>% rowwise() %>% mutate(sp_end = {sp <- get_signal_peptide_position(uniprot)
      if (is.null(sp) || is.na(sp$end)) 0 else sp$end} ) %>% ungroup()
  df_pwm_scores <- df_pwm_scores %>% left_join(sp_table, by = "uniprot") %>% mutate( pos = pos + sp_end ) %>% filter(pos >= 1) %>% dplyr::select(-sp_end)
  null_means_9mer <- df_pwm_scores %>%
  filter(grepl("^rand9", pwm)) %>%
  group_by(pwm) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_score = mean(score_01, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_sites = sum(!is.na(score_01)),
    .groups = "drop" 
  ) #csg = 261
  
  null_means_5mer <- df_pwm_scores %>%
  filter(grepl("^rand5", pwm)) %>%
  group_by(pwm) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_score = mean(score_01, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_sites = sum(!is.na(score_01)),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) #261
  
  model_cols_aligned <- c("pwm_relaxed_aligned_01")
  model_cols_unaligned <- c("pwm_deseq2_01", "pwm_relaxed_unaligned_01")

  model_means_aligned <- df_merops %>% dplyr::select(uniprot, pos) %>% dplyr::left_join( df_model %>% dplyr::select(uniprot, pos, all_of(model_cols_aligned)), by = c("uniprot", "pos") ) %>% tidyr::pivot_longer( cols = all_of(model_cols_aligned), names_to = "model", values_to = "score" ) %>% dplyr::filter(!is.na(score)) %>% dplyr::group_by(model) %>% dplyr::summarise( mean_score = mean(score), n_sites = n(), .groups = "drop" )
  model_means_aligned <- model_means_aligned %>%
  dplyr::rowwise() %>%
  dplyr::mutate(percentile = mean(null_means_9mer$mean_score < mean_score))
  model_means_unaligned <- df_merops %>% dplyr::select(uniprot, pos) %>% dplyr::left_join( df_model %>% dplyr::select(uniprot, pos, all_of(model_cols_unaligned)), by = c("uniprot", "pos") ) %>% tidyr::pivot_longer( cols = all_of(model_cols_unaligned), names_to = "model", values_to = "score" ) %>% dplyr::filter(!is.na(score)) %>% dplyr::group_by(model) %>% dplyr::summarise( mean_score = mean(score), n_sites = n(), .groups = "drop" )
  model_means_unaligned <- model_means_unaligned %>%
  dplyr::rowwise() %>%
  dplyr::mutate(percentile = mean(null_means_5mer$mean_score < mean_score))
  
  lis <- list(null_means_9mer, null_means_5mer)
  lis2 <- list(model_means_aligned, model_means_unaligned)
  
  #1) look at df_merops. for each substrate, figure out cut site with highest score mean (across all). 
  #2) look at df_pwm_scores. 
  
  
  df_model_cuts_all <- df_merops %>% dplyr::select(uniprot, pos) %>% dplyr::left_join( df_model %>% dplyr::select( uniprot, pos, pwm_deseq2_01, pwm_relaxed_unaligned_01, pwm_relaxed_aligned_01 ), by = c("uniprot", "pos") ) %>% tidyr::pivot_longer( cols = starts_with("pwm_"), names_to = "model", values_to = "score_01" ) %>% dplyr::filter(!is.na(score_01))
  df_model_best_site <- df_model_cuts_all %>%
  group_by(uniprot, pos) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_model_score = mean(score_01, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  group_by(uniprot) %>%
  slice_max(mean_model_score, n = 1, with_ties = FALSE) %>%
  dplyr::select(uniprot, pos)
  
  df_model_cuts_best <- df_model_cuts_all %>%
  inner_join(df_model_best_site, by = c("uniprot", "pos"))
 
  
  df_pwm_scores_best <- df_pwm_scores %>%
  inner_join(df_model_best_site, by = c("uniprot", "pos"))
  
  lis_null <- list(
  df_pwm_scores_best %>% dplyr::filter(grepl("^rand9", pwm)),
  df_pwm_scores_best %>% dplyr::filter(grepl("^rand5", pwm))
  )
  
  
  add_percentile <- function(df_model, kmer) {
    df_null <- df_pwm_scores %>%
    dplyr::filter(grepl(paste0("^rand", kmer), pwm))
    df_model %>%
    dplyr::rowwise() %>%
    dplyr::mutate(percentile = mean(
        df_null$score_01[df_null$uniprot == uniprot] < score_01, na.rm = TRUE)) %>% dplyr::ungroup()}
  lis_model <- list(add_percentile( df_model_cuts_best %>% dplyr::filter(model %in% c("pwm_relaxed_aligned_01")), kmer = 9 ), add_percentile( df_model_cuts_best %>% dplyr::filter(model %in% c("pwm_relaxed_unaligned_01", "pwm_deseq2_01")), kmer = 5 ))
  
  for (j in seq_along(lis)) {
    n_sites <- unique(lis2[[j]]$n_sites)
    plot <- ggplot(lis[[j]], aes(x = mean_score)) +
    geom_histogram(bins = 60, fill = "grey80", color = "black") +
    geom_vline(data = lis2[[j]], aes(xintercept = mean_score, color = model), linewidth = 1.2, show.legend = TRUE) +
    geom_text(data = lis2[[j]], aes(x = mean_score, y = Inf, label = scales::percent(percentile, accuracy = 0.1), color = model), vjust = 1.4, size = 5, show.legend = FALSE) +
    scale_color_manual(
      name = "PWM",
      values = c(
        pwm_deseq2_01 = "#000000",
        pwm_relaxed_unaligned_01 = "#ef8a62",
        pwm_relaxed_aligned_01 = "#1b9e77"
      ),
      labels = c(
        pwm_deseq2_01 = "DESeq2 (PWM) (0 to 1)",
        pwm_relaxed_unaligned_01 = "Sig peptides (PWM; relaxed unaligned) (0 to 1)",
        pwm_relaxed_aligned_01 = "Sig peptides (PWM; relaxed aligned) (0 to 1)"
      )
    ) +
    labs(x = paste0( "Mean PWM score (n = ", n_sites, " MEROPs sites)"),
         y = "Number of random PWMs",
         title = c("9-mer PWMs", "5-mer PWMs")[j]) +
    theme_bw(base_size = 12) +
     theme(
    legend.position = "bottom",
    legend.title = element_text(size = 10),
    legend.text  = element_text(size = 9)
    )
    ggsave(
      filename = file.path("figures", paste0(gsub(" ", "_", combined[i]), "_pwm_null_plot_", j, ".png")),
      plot = plot, width = 7, height = 5, units = "in", dpi = 150
    )
    knitr::include_graphics(
      file.path("figures", paste0(gsub(" ", "_", combined[i]), "_pwm_null_plot_", j, ".png"))
    )
  
    score_cols <- c("pwm_deseq2", "pwm_relaxed_unaligned", "pwm_relaxed_aligned")
    score_cols_name <- c("DESeq2 (PWM)", "Sig peptides (PWM; relaxed unaligned)", "Sig peptides (PWM; relaxed aligned)")
    facet_labeller <- function(df) {
    setNames(
      paste0(substrate_name_map[df$uniprot], "\nCut site: ", df$pos),
      df$uniprot
    )
    }
    substrates <- protease_map[[combined[i]]]
    null_j <- lis_null[[j]] %>% dplyr::filter(uniprot %in% substrates)
    model_j <- lis_model[[j]] %>% dplyr::filter(uniprot %in% substrates)
    if (nrow(null_j) == 0 || nrow(model_j) == 0) {
      message(sprintf(
        "Skipping per-substrate null plot for %s (panel %d): no overlapping sites after filtering to protease_map substrates.",
        combined[i], j
      ))
      next
    }
    plot <- ggplot(null_j, aes(x = score_01)) +
    geom_histogram(bins = 30, fill = "grey80", color = "black") +
    geom_vline(
      data = model_j,
      aes(xintercept = score_01, color = model),
      linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 0.7
    ) +
    geom_text(
      data = model_j %>%
        arrange(score_01) %>%
        group_by(uniprot) %>%
        mutate(y_offset = seq_len(n()) * 0.04),
      aes(
        x = score_01,
        y = Inf - y_offset,
        label = scales::percent(percentile, accuracy = 0.1),
        color = model
      ),
      vjust = 1,
      size = 2.5,
      show.legend = FALSE
    ) +
    facet_wrap(
      ~ uniprot,
      nrow = 4,
      scales = "free_y",
      labeller = labeller(uniprot = facet_labeller(model_j))
    ) +
    scale_color_manual(
      name = "PWM",
      values = c(
        pwm_relaxed_aligned_01 = "#1b9e77",
        pwm_relaxed_unaligned_01 = "#ef8a62",
        pwm_deseq2_01 = "#000000"
      ),
      labels = c(
        pwm_deseq2_01 = "DESeq2 (PWM)",
        pwm_relaxed_unaligned_01 = "Relaxed unaligned PWM",
        pwm_relaxed_aligned_01 = "Relaxed aligned PWM"
      )
    ) +
    scale_y_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.15))) +
    labs(
      x = "PWM score (0–1)",
      y = "Number of random PWMs",
      color = "PWM"
    ) +
    theme_bw(base_size = 12) +
    theme(
      legend.position = "bottom",
      strip.text = element_text(size = 8),
      legend.box = "horizontal"
    )
    save_fig(plot, paste0(gsub(" ", "_", combined[i]), "_null_dist_", j), width = 10, height = 6)
  }
}
  


```


# Modeling and substrate cleavage prediction

We next integrate phage-derived cleavage preferences (PWM / peptide scores) with AlphaFold2 structural features (SASA, pLDDT, packing, etc.) at candidate cut sites.

### Structural context of known cleavage sites

We first compare structural feature distributions at MEROPS-annotated cut sites versus the background of all scored sites on the same proteins (Appendix S15).


```{r plot-structural-feature-densities}
struct_vars <- c( "rSASA_P1", "rSASA_P1p", "mean_rSASA_w", "max_rSASA_w", "pct_exposed_w", "pLDDT_P1", "mean_pLDDT_w", "residue_depth_P1", "neighbors_6A", "neighbors_8A")
struct_names <- c("relative SASA at P1", "relative SASA at P1'", "mean SASA P4-P4'", "max SASA P4-P4'", "% exposed P4-P4'", 'pLDDT at P1', "mean pLDDT P4-P4'", 'residue depth at P1', 'neighbors in 6A', 'neighbors in 8A')
prot_cols <- c(
  "cathepsin G" = "red",
  "elastase" = "blue"
)

df_background <- df_cutsite %>%
  dplyr::select(all_of(struct_vars)) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = everything(), names_to = "metric", values_to = "value")

df_hits_list <- list()

for (i in seq_along(proteases)) {
  prot_name <- proteases[i]
  df_merops_mapped <- read.csv(paste0(combined[i], "_merops_mapped.csv"), skip = 1) %>%
    transmute(uniprot, pos = P1_position) %>%
    distinct() # Remove duplicates
  df_hits_list[[i]] <- df_merops_mapped %>%
    inner_join(df_cutsite, by = c("uniprot", "pos")) %>%
    mutate(protease = prot_name)
  
}

df_hits_all <- bind_rows(df_hits_list)

bg_means <- df_cutsite %>%
  summarise(across(all_of(struct_vars), \(x) median(x, na.rm = TRUE))) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = everything(), names_to = "metric", values_to = "bg_median")
df_stats <- df_hits_all %>%
  group_by(protease) %>%
  summarise(across(all_of(struct_vars), \(x) median(x, na.rm = TRUE))) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = -protease, names_to = "metric", values_to = "hit_median") %>%
  left_join(bg_means, by = "metric") %>%
  mutate(delta_median = hit_median - bg_median)



name_map <- setNames(struct_names, struct_vars)
make_metric_row <- function(metric_name, show_titles = FALSE) {
  bg_data <- df_cutsite %>% dplyr::select(value = !!sym(metric_name))
  hit_data <- df_hits_all %>% dplyr::select(protease, value = !!sym(metric_name))
  row_stats <- df_stats %>% filter(metric == metric_name)
  
  ggplot() +
    geom_density(data = bg_data, aes(x = value), fill = "grey85", color = "grey", alpha = 0.9) +
    geom_density(data = hit_data, aes(x = value, fill = protease, color = protease), alpha = 0.2) +
    geom_rug(data = hit_data, aes(x = value, color = protease), sides = "b", alpha = 0.2) +
    geom_text( data = row_stats, aes(label = paste0("Δmedian: ", sprintf("%.2f", delta_median))), x = Inf, y = Inf, hjust = 1.1, vjust = 1.5, size = 2.2, fontface = "bold", inherit.aes = FALSE ) +
    facet_wrap(~protease, ncol = 2, scales = "free") + 
    scale_fill_manual(values = prot_cols) +
    scale_color_manual(values = prot_cols) +
    theme_classic(base_size = 9) +
    theme(
      legend.position = "none",
      strip.text = if(show_titles) element_text(face = "bold", size = 10) else element_blank(),
      strip.background = element_blank(),
      axis.title.x = element_blank(),
      axis.text.x = element_text(size = 7),
      axis.text.y = element_text(size = 7), 
      axis.title.y = element_text(size = 6, face = "bold", angle = 90),
      plot.margin = margin(t = 1, r = 5, b = 1, l = 5),
      panel.spacing = unit(1, "lines")
    ) +
    labs(y = name_map[metric_name])
}
plot_list <- list()
for (i in seq_along(struct_vars)) {
  plot_list[[i]] <- make_metric_row(struct_vars[i], show_titles = (i == 1))
}
final_plot <- wrap_plots(plot_list, ncol = 1)
save_fig(final_plot, "structural_feature_densities", width = 10, height = 16)

```

Joint view of phage PWM score versus selected structural metrics for hits and background:

```{r plot-score-vs-structure-2d}
hits_with_scores_list <- list()
bg_2d_list   <- list()
prot_names <- proteases
for (i in seq_along(proteases)) {
  dir_in <- paste0("F:/Alphafold Phage Project/", combined[i])
  df_raw <- read.csv( paste0(dir_in, "/", combined[i], "_all_cut_scores.csv"), stringsAsFactors = FALSE )
  df_z <- read.csv( paste0(dir_in, "/", combined[i], "_all_cut_scores_z.csv"), stringsAsFactors = FALSE )
  df_01 <- read.csv( paste0(dir_in, "/", combined[i], "_all_cut_scores_01.csv"), stringsAsFactors = FALSE )
  df_merops <- read.csv( paste0(combined[i], "_merops_mapped.csv"), stringsAsFactors = FALSE, skip = 1 ) %>%   transmute(uniprot, substrate, pos = P1_position, cleavage_type = cleavage_type, is_merops = TRUE) 
  df_merops <- df_merops %>% group_by(uniprot, pos) %>% summarise(substrate     = dplyr::first(substrate),cleavage_type = paste(sort(unique(cleavage_type)), collapse = "/"), is_merops = TRUE,.groups = "drop")
  df_model <- prep_model_df(df_raw, df_z, df_01, df_cutsite, df_merops)
  
  bg_2d_list[[i]] <- df_model %>%
    dplyr::select(pwm_score = pwm_relaxed_unaligned_01, all_of(struct_vars)) %>%
    filter(!is.na(pwm_score)) %>%
    slice_sample(n = 5000) %>% 
    mutate(protease = prot_names[i])
  
  hits_with_scores_list[[i]] <- df_model %>%
    filter(is_merops == TRUE) %>%
    dplyr::select(
      uniprot, pos, 
      pwm_score = pwm_relaxed_unaligned_01, 
      all_of(struct_vars)
    ) %>%
    mutate(protease = prot_names[i])
}

df_bg_final <- bind_rows(bg_2d_list) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = all_of(struct_vars), names_to = "metric", values_to = "struct_val") %>%
  mutate(metric_label = factor(metric, levels = struct_vars, labels = struct_names))

df_hits_2d_master <- bind_rows(hits_with_scores_list)

df_hits_2d_long <- df_hits_2d_master %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = all_of(struct_vars),
    names_to = "metric",
    values_to = "struct_value"
  ) %>%
  mutate(metric_label = factor(metric, levels = struct_vars, labels = struct_names))
df_corrs <- df_hits_2d_long %>%
  group_by(metric_label, protease) %>%
  summarise(
    r_val = cor(pwm_score, struct_value, method = "spearman", use = "complete.obs"),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(label = paste0("R = ", sprintf("%.2f", r_val)))

df_corr_labels_simple <- df_hits_2d_long %>%
  group_by(metric_label, protease) %>%
  summarise(
    r_val = cor(pwm_score, struct_value, method = "spearman", use = "complete.obs"),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(line = paste0(protease, ": r = ", sprintf("%.2f", r_val))) %>%
  group_by(metric_label) %>%
  summarise(
    final_label = paste(line, collapse = "\n"),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

plot <- ggplot() +
  geom_point(
    data = df_bg_final, 
    aes(x = pwm_score, y = struct_val, color = "grey"), 
    alpha = 1, size = 0.3, stroke = 0
  ) +
  geom_point(
    data = df_hits_2d_long, 
    aes(x = pwm_score, y = struct_value, color = protease), 
    alpha = 0.25, size = 2, stroke = 0
  ) +
  geom_smooth(
    data = df_hits_2d_long, 
    aes(x = pwm_score, y = struct_value, color = protease),
    method = "lm", formula = y ~ x, se = FALSE, linewidth = 0.8, linetype = "dashed"
  ) +

  geom_text(
    data = df_corr_labels_simple,
    aes(x = -Inf, y = Inf, label = final_label),
    hjust = -0.1, 
    vjust = 1.2,   
    size = 2, 
    fontface = "bold",
    lineheight = 0.9, 
    inherit.aes = FALSE
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = c(0.05, 0.2))) + 
  
  facet_wrap(~ metric_label, scales = "free_y", ncol = 2) +
  scale_color_manual(values = prot_cols) +
  labs(
    title = "Sequence vs. Structure: 2D Distribution of MEROPS Hits",
    subtitle = "Grey fill = Background; R = Spearman Correlation",
    x = "Sequence Score (PWM: 0 to 1)",
    y = "Structural Metric Value",
    color = "Protease"
  ) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 11) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "top",
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold", size = 9),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
  )
save_fig(plot, "score_vs_structure_2d", width = 12, height = 8)
```




For each feature, convert MEROPS-site values to percentiles relative to background and summarize (Appendix S15):

```{r feature-percentile-heatmap}
pwm_vars <- c(
  "pwm_deseq2_01",
  "pwm_relaxed_unaligned_01",
  "pwm_relaxed_aligned_01",
  "pep_deseq2_01",
  "pep_relaxed_unaligned_01",
  "pep_relaxed_aligned_01"
)
pwm_labels <- c(
  pwm_deseq2_01 = "PWM (DESeq2)",
  pwm_relaxed_unaligned_01 = "PWM (relaxed unaligned)",
  pwm_relaxed_aligned_01 = "PWM (relaxed aligned)",
  pep_deseq2_01 = "Peptide Profile (DESeq2)",
  pep_relaxed_unaligned_01 = "Pep Profile (relaxed unaligned)",
  pep_relaxed_aligned_01 = "Pep Profile (relaxed aligned)"
)
target_columns <- c(struct_vars, pwm_vars)

struct_labeller <- setNames(struct_names, struct_vars)

heatmap_data_list <- list()
for (i in seq_along(proteases)) {
  dir_in <- paste0("F:/Alphafold Phage Project/", combined[i])
  df_raw <- read.csv( paste0(dir_in, "/", combined[i], "_all_cut_scores.csv"), stringsAsFactors = FALSE )
  df_z <- read.csv( paste0(dir_in, "/", combined[i], "_all_cut_scores_z.csv"), stringsAsFactors = FALSE )
  df_01 <- read.csv( paste0(dir_in, "/", combined[i], "_all_cut_scores_01.csv"), stringsAsFactors = FALSE )
  df_merops <- read.csv( paste0(combined[i], "_merops_mapped.csv"), stringsAsFactors = FALSE, skip = 1 ) %>%   transmute(uniprot, motif_8mer,  substrate, pos = P1_position, cleavage_type = cleavage_type, is_merops = TRUE) 
  cat(paste0("Distinct motifs: ", n_distinct(df_merops$motif_8mer), " (Before: ", nrow(df_merops), " | After: ", nrow(distinct(df_merops, motif_8mer)), ")\n"))
  df_merops <- df_merops %>% distinct(motif_8mer, .keep_all = TRUE)
  df_merops <- df_merops %>% group_by(uniprot, pos) %>% summarise(substrate     = dplyr::first(substrate),cleavage_type = paste(sort(unique(cleavage_type)), collapse = "/"), is_merops = TRUE,.groups = "drop")
  df_raw_filtered <- df_raw %>% filter(uniprot %in% df_merops$uniprot)
  df_model <- prep_model_df(df_raw_filtered, df_z, df_01, df_cutsite, df_merops)
  df_model_2 <- prep_model_df(df_raw, df_z, df_01, df_cutsite, df_merops)
  
  
  df_hits <- df_model %>% filter(is_merops == TRUE)
  summarized_stats <- df_hits %>%
    summarise(across(all_of(target_columns), function(x) {
      col_name <- cur_column()
      bg_vals <- df_model[[col_name]]
      bg_vals <- bg_vals[!is.na(bg_vals)]
      if(length(bg_vals) == 0) return(NA)
      percentile_fn <- ecdf(bg_vals)
      mean(percentile_fn(x), na.rm = TRUE) * 100
    })) %>%
    mutate(protease = prot_names[i])
  
  heatmap_data_list[[i]] <- summarized_stats
}

df_heatmap_final <- bind_rows(heatmap_data_list) %>%
  pivot_longer(-protease, names_to = "metric", values_to = "mean_perc") %>%
  mutate(category = ifelse(metric %in% struct_vars, "Alphafold2 Structure", "Phage Cleaved Peptide Match"),category = factor(category, levels = c("Phage Cleaved Peptide Match", "Alphafold2 Structure")),protease = factor(protease, levels = rev(proteases))))

p_heat <- ggplot(df_heatmap_final, aes(x = metric, y = protease, fill = mean_perc)) +
  geom_tile(color = "white", linewidth = 0.5) +
  geom_text(aes(label = sprintf("%.2f", mean_perc)), size = 3, fontface = "bold") +
  scale_fill_gradient2(
    low = "#2166ac", mid = "#f7f7f7", high = "#b2182b",
    midpoint = 50, limit = c(0, 100), name = "Mean\nPercentile"
  ) +
  facet_wrap(~category, ncol = 1, scales = "free_x") +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = function(x) {
    ifelse(x %in% names(struct_labeller), struct_labeller[x],
    ifelse(x %in% names(pwm_labels), pwm_labels[x], x))
  }) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 11) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, face = "bold"),
    axis.title = element_blank(),
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold")
  )
save_fig(p_heat, "feature_percentile_heatmap", width = 14, height = 6)




```


As a baseline before machine learning, we evaluated composite PWM / peptide-profile scores with ROC and confusion matrices on the full cut-site landscape and on a balanced 1:1 MEROPS:background subsample (Appendix S11–S14):

```{r pwm-structure-combined-scores}
comparison_data <- list()
roc_pr_list <- list()
method_labels <- c(
  S1 = "PWM (DESeq2) 0-1",
  S2 = "PWM (unaligned) 0-1",
  S3 = "PWM (aligned) 0-1",
  S4 = "Peptide Profile (DESeq2) 0-1",
  S5 = "PWM (DESeq2) + PWM (aligned)",
  S6 = "Peptide Profile (DESeq2) + PWM (aligned)",
  S7 = "PWM (DESeq2) + PWM (aligned) + Peptide Profile (DESeq2)",
  S8 = "PWM (DESeq2) * PWM (aligned) * Peptide Profile (DESeq2)"
)

for (i in seq_along(proteases)) {
  dir_in <- paste0("F:/Alphafold Phage Project/", combined[i])
  df_raw <- read.csv(paste0(dir_in, "/", combined[i], "_all_cut_scores.csv"), stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
  df_z <- read.csv(paste0(dir_in, "/", combined[i], "_all_cut_scores_z.csv"), stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
  df_01 <- read.csv(paste0(dir_in, "/", combined[i], "_all_cut_scores_01.csv"), stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
  df_merops <- read.csv(paste0(combined[i], "_merops_mapped.csv"), stringsAsFactors = FALSE, skip = 1) %>%
    transmute(uniprot, substrate, pos = P1_position, cleavage_type = cleavage_type, is_merops = TRUE)
  df_merops <- df_merops %>%
    group_by(uniprot, pos) %>%
    summarise(
      substrate = dplyr::first(substrate),
      cleavage_type = paste(sort(unique(cleavage_type)), collapse = "/"),
      is_merops = TRUE,
      .groups = "drop"
    )
  df_model <- prep_model_df(df_raw, df_z, df_01, df_cutsite, df_merops)

  df_normalized <- df_model %>%
    group_by(uniprot) %>%
    mutate(across(all_of(struct_vars), function(x) {
      if (all(is.na(x)) || min(x, na.rm = TRUE) == max(x, na.rm = TRUE)) return(x)
      (x - min(x, na.rm = TRUE)) / (max(x, na.rm = TRUE) - min(x, na.rm = TRUE))
    })) %>%
    ungroup()

  df_scored <- df_normalized %>%
    mutate(
      S1 = pwm_deseq2_01,
      S2 = pwm_relaxed_unaligned_01,
      S3 = pwm_relaxed_aligned_01,
      S4 = pep_deseq2,
      S5 = pwm_deseq2_01 + pwm_relaxed_aligned_01,
      S6 = pep_deseq2_01 + pwm_relaxed_aligned_01,
      S7 = pwm_deseq2_01 + pwm_relaxed_aligned_01 + pep_deseq2,
      S8 = pwm_deseq2_01 * pwm_relaxed_aligned_01 * pep_deseq2
    )

  score_cols <- paste0("S", 1:8)
  colnames(df_scored)[(ncol(df_scored) - 7):ncol(df_scored)] <- score_cols

  stats <- df_scored %>%
    filter(is_merops == TRUE) %>%
    summarise(across(all_of(score_cols), function(x) {
      bg <- df_scored[[cur_column()]]
      mean(ecdf(bg[!is.na(bg)])(x), na.rm = TRUE) * 100
    })) %>%
    mutate(protease = prot_names[i])

  comparison_data[[i]] <- stats

  roc_pr_list[[i]] <- df_scored %>%
    dplyr::select(is_merops, all_of(score_cols)) %>%
    mutate(protease = prot_names[i])
}

df_heat_compare <- bind_rows(comparison_data) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = starts_with("S"), names_to = "method", values_to = "mean_perc")
df_dist_all <- bind_rows(roc_pr_list) %>%
  mutate(is_merops = ifelse(is.na(is_merops) | is_merops == FALSE, 0, 1))

create_protease_row <- function(p_name, df_dist, df_heat, labels_map, balanced = FALSE) {
  df_heat_sub <- df_heat %>% filter(protease == p_name)

  df_p_full <- df_dist %>% filter(protease == p_name) %>% drop_na(starts_with("S"))
  if (balanced) {
    hits <- df_p_full %>% filter(is_merops == TRUE)
    bg <- df_p_full %>% filter(is_merops == FALSE)
    set.seed(42)
    bg_sampled <- bg %>% sample_n(nrow(hits))
    df_p <- bind_rows(hits, bg_sampled)
  } else {
    df_p <- df_p_full
  }

  p1 <- ggplot(df_heat_sub, aes(x = method, y = protease, fill = mean_perc)) +
    geom_tile(color = "white") +
    geom_text(aes(label = sprintf("%.1f", mean_perc)), size = 3, fontface = "bold") +
    scale_fill_gradient2(low = "#2166ac", mid = "#f7f7f7", high = "#b2182b", midpoint = 50, limit = c(0, 100)) +
    scale_x_discrete(labels = labels_map) +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 9) +
    theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1), legend.position = "none") +
    labs(x = NULL, y = NULL, title = paste(p_name, ": Mean Percentiles"))

  df_bell <- df_p %>%
    mutate(is_merops_factor = factor(ifelse(is_merops == TRUE, "Hit", "BG"), levels = c("BG", "Hit"))) %>%
    pivot_longer(cols = starts_with("S"), names_to = "Method_ID", values_to = "Score") %>%
    mutate(Method_Label = factor(labels_map[Method_ID], levels = labels_map))

  p2 <- ggplot(df_bell, aes(x = Score, fill = is_merops_factor)) +
    geom_density(alpha = 0.6, color = "white", linewidth = 0.2) +
    facet_wrap(~Method_Label, scales = "free", ncol = 8) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = c("BG" = "grey75", "Hit" = "#e41a1c")) +
    theme_bw(base_size = 8) +
    theme(
      legend.position = "none",
      strip.background = element_blank(),
      strip.text = element_blank(),
      axis.text.y = element_blank(),
      axis.ticks.y = element_blank(),
      plot.margin = margin(5, 5, 5, 5)
    ) +
    labs(x = "Score", y = "Density")

  perf_plots <- lapply(names(labels_map), function(m_id) {
    roc_obj <- pROC::roc(df_p$is_merops, df_p[[m_id]], quiet = TRUE)
    best_coords <- pROC::coords(roc_obj, "best", ret = c("threshold", "tp", "tn", "fp", "fn"), transpose = FALSE)
    best_threshold <- best_coords$threshold[1]
    auc_val <- as.numeric(roc_obj$auc)

    p_roc <- ggplot(
      data.frame(fpr = 1 - roc_obj$specificities, tpr = roc_obj$sensitivities),
      aes(x = fpr, y = tpr)
    ) +
      geom_line(color = "#2166ac", linewidth = 0.8) +
      geom_abline(linetype = "dashed", color = "grey") +
      annotate("text", x = 0.5, y = 0.2, label = sprintf("AUC:%.3f", auc_val),
               size = 2, fontface = "bold") +
      theme_bw(base_size = 7) +
      theme(
        legend.position = "none",
        strip.background = element_blank(),
        strip.text = element_blank(),
        axis.text.y = element_blank(),
        axis.ticks.y = element_blank(),
        plot.margin = margin(5, 5, 5, 5)
      ) +
      labs(x = "FPR", y = "TPR")

    cm_df <- data.frame(
      Actual = factor(c("1", "1", "0", "0"), levels = c("1", "0")),
      Pred = factor(c("1", "0", "1", "0"), levels = c("1", "0")),
      Count = as.numeric(c(
        best_coords$tp[1], best_coords$fn[1],
        best_coords$fp[1], best_coords$tn[1]
      ))
    )

    p_cm <- ggplot(cm_df, aes(x = Pred, y = Actual, fill = Count)) +
      geom_tile(color = "white") +
      geom_text(aes(label = Count), size = 2, fontface = "bold") +
      scale_fill_gradient(low = "white", high = "#4daf4a") +
      scale_y_discrete(limits = rev) +
      scale_x_discrete(limits = c("0", "1"), position = "top") +
      theme_minimal(base_size = 7) +
      theme(
        legend.position = "none",
        axis.title = element_blank(),
        panel.grid = element_blank(),
        panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA, linewidth = 0.5)
      ) +
      labs(title = sprintf("Threshold: %.2f", best_threshold))

    p_roc / p_cm
  })

  p_perf_grid <- wrap_plots(perf_plots, ncol = 8)
  wrap_plots(p1, p2, p_perf_grid, ncol = 1, heights = c(0.2, 1, 2))
}

row_catG <- create_protease_row("cathepsin G", df_dist_all, df_heat_compare, method_labels)
row_elast <- create_protease_row("elastase", df_dist_all, df_heat_compare, method_labels)
save_fig(row_catG, "prediction_row_cathepsin_G", width = 14, height = 8)
save_fig(row_elast, "prediction_row_elastase", width = 14, height = 8)

row_catG_bal <- create_protease_row("cathepsin G", df_dist_all, df_heat_compare, method_labels, balanced = TRUE)
row_elast_bal <- create_protease_row("elastase", df_dist_all, df_heat_compare, method_labels, balanced = TRUE)
save_fig(row_catG_bal, "prediction_row_cathepsin_G_balanced", width = 14, height = 8)
save_fig(row_elast_bal, "prediction_row_elastase_balanced", width = 14, height = 8)
```
  


# Cleavage-site prediction with XGBoost

We trained one binary XGBoost classifier per protease to distinguish MEROPS cleavage sites from other positions on the same substrates, using phage-derived sequence scores and AlphaFold2 structural features (Appendix S16–S18). Sites with identical 8-mer motifs were collapsed to a single representative before training so near-duplicates do not inflate performance.

Models use fixed hyperparameters: nrounds = 100, max_depth = 6, eta = 0.01, subsample = 0.7, colsample_bytree = 0.7. We report both the natural (unbalanced) landscape and a balanced 1:1 MEROPS:background subsample.

Helper functions for table loading, motif deduplication, feature matrix construction, median imputation, metrics, and plotting:

```{r modeling-helpers}
# Feature labels
struct_labeller <- setNames(struct_names, struct_vars)

pwm_labels <- c(
  pwm_deseq2 = "PWM (DESeq2)",
  pwm_deseq2_01 = "PWM (DESeq2) (0-1)",
  pwm_deseq2_z = "PWM (DESeq2) (Z)",
  pep_deseq2 = "Pep Profile (DESeq2)",
  pep_deseq2_01 = "Pep Profile (DESeq2) (0-1)",
  pep_deseq2_z = "Pep Profile (DESeq2) (Z)",
  pwm_relaxed_aligned = "PWM (Relaxed Aligned)",
  pwm_relaxed_aligned_01 = "PWM (Relaxed Aligned) (0-1)",
  pwm_relaxed_aligned_z = "PWM (Relaxed Aligned) (Z)",
  pwm_relaxed_unaligned = "PWM (Relaxed Unaligned)",
  pwm_relaxed_unaligned_01 = "PWM (Relaxed Unaligned) (0-1)",
  pwm_relaxed_unaligned_z = "PWM (Relaxed Unaligned) (Z)",
  pep_relaxed_aligned = "Pep Profile (Relaxed Aligned)",
  pep_relaxed_aligned_01 = "Pep Profile (Relaxed Aligned) (0-1)",
  pep_relaxed_aligned_z = "Pep Profile (Relaxed Aligned) (Z)",
  pep_relaxed_unaligned = "Pep Profile (Relaxed Unaligned)",
  pep_relaxed_unaligned_01 = "Pep Profile (Relaxed Unaligned) (0-1)",
  pep_relaxed_unaligned_z = "Pep Profile (Relaxed Unaligned) (Z)"
)

load_protease_tables <- function(protease, project_root = "F:/Alphafold Phage Project") {
  dir_in <- file.path(project_root, protease)
  list(
    protease = protease,
    raw = read.csv(file.path(dir_in, paste0(protease, "_all_cut_scores.csv")), stringsAsFactors = FALSE),
    z   = read.csv(file.path(dir_in, paste0(protease, "_all_cut_scores_z.csv")), stringsAsFactors = FALSE),
    o1  = read.csv(file.path(dir_in, paste0(protease, "_all_cut_scores_01.csv")), stringsAsFactors = FALSE),
    merops = read.csv(paste0(protease, "_merops_mapped.csv"), stringsAsFactors = FALSE, skip = 1) %>%
      transmute(
        uniprot,
        motif_8mer,
        substrate,
        pos = P1_position,
        cleavage_type
      )
  )
}

# Collapse highly similar sites (identical 8-mer motifs) to one row
dedupe_similar_sites <- function(df_merops) {
  n0 <- nrow(df_merops)
  out <- df_merops %>%
    dplyr::filter(!is.na(motif_8mer), motif_8mer != "") %>%
    dplyr::distinct(motif_8mer, .keep_all = TRUE) %>%
    dplyr::group_by(uniprot, pos) %>%
    dplyr::summarise(
      substrate = dplyr::first(substrate),
      cleavage_type = paste(sort(unique(cleavage_type)), collapse = "/"),
      motif_8mer = dplyr::first(motif_8mer),
      is_merops = TRUE,
      .groups = "drop"
    )
  message(sprintf(
    "Similar-site filter: %d MEROPS rows -> %d unique motifs/sites",
    n0, nrow(out)
  ))
  out
}

build_model_frame <- function(tables, df_cutsite) {
  df_merops <- dedupe_similar_sites(tables$merops)
  # Restrict background to MEROPS substrate proteins (same proteins as positives)
  df_raw_f <- tables$raw %>% dplyr::filter(uniprot %in% df_merops$uniprot)
  df_model <- prep_model_df(df_raw_f, tables$z, tables$o1, df_cutsite, df_merops)
  df_model
}

get_feature_matrix <- function(df) {
  drop_cols <- c(
    "protein", "uniprot", "pos", "cleavage_type", "is_merops", "cleaved",
    ".row_id", "protein.x", "protein.y", "protein_01", "protease", "motif_8mer",
    "substrate"
  )
  X <- df %>%
    dplyr::select(-dplyr::any_of(drop_cols)) %>%
    dplyr::select(where(is.numeric))
  X <- X[, !grepl("strict", names(X), ignore.case = TRUE), drop = FALSE]
  meta_cols <- intersect(c("uniprot", "pos", "motif_8mer"), names(df))
  list(X = as.data.frame(X), y = as.integer(df$cleaved), site_meta = df[, meta_cols, drop = FALSE])
}

impute_median <- function(mat, meds) {
  for (j in seq_along(meds)) {
    nas <- is.na(mat[, j])
    if (any(nas)) mat[nas, j] <- meds[j]
  }
  mat
}

calc_stats <- function(y_true, y_prob, threshold) {
  y_pred <- ifelse(y_prob >= threshold, 1L, 0L)
  TP <- sum(y_true == 1 & y_pred == 1)
  FP <- sum(y_true == 0 & y_pred == 1)
  FN <- sum(y_true == 1 & y_pred == 0)
  TN <- sum(y_true == 0 & y_pred == 0)
  sens <- if ((TP + FN) == 0) 0 else TP / (TP + FN)
  spec <- if ((TN + FP) == 0) 0 else TN / (TN + FP)
  prec <- if ((TP + FP) == 0) 0 else TP / (TP + FP)
  f1   <- if ((prec + sens) == 0) 0 else 2 * prec * sens / (prec + sens)
  c(sens = sens, spec = spec, prec = prec, f1 = f1)
}

calc_prc <- function(probs, obs) {
  df <- data.frame(prob = probs, obs = obs) %>%
    dplyr::arrange(dplyr::desc(prob)) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      tpr = cumsum(obs) / sum(obs),
      prec = cumsum(obs) / dplyr::row_number()
    )
  sum(diff(df$tpr) * df$prec[-1], na.rm = TRUE)
}

get_metrics_xgb <- function(probs, train_probs, y_test, y_train, mod_name, model_obj, balanced = FALSE) {
  probs <- as.numeric(probs)
  train_probs <- as.numeric(train_probs)
  y_test <- as.integer(y_test)
  y_train <- as.integer(y_train)

  roc_test  <- pROC::roc(y_test, probs, quiet = TRUE)
  roc_train <- pROC::roc(y_train, train_probs, quiet = TRUE)
  auc_val   <- as.numeric(roc_test$auc)
  auc_train <- as.numeric(roc_train$auc)

  thresh <- as.numeric(
    pROC::coords(roc_test, "best", ret = "threshold", best.method = "youden")$threshold[1]
  )

  prc_val   <- calc_prc(probs, y_test)
  prc_train <- calc_prc(train_probs, y_train)
  baseline_test  <- mean(y_test == 1)
  baseline_train <- mean(y_train == 1)

  cm_test <- caret::confusionMatrix(
    factor(ifelse(probs >= thresh, 1, 0), levels = c(0, 1)),
    factor(y_test, levels = c(0, 1)),
    positive = "1"
  )
  cm_train <- caret::confusionMatrix(
    factor(ifelse(train_probs >= thresh, 1, 0), levels = c(0, 1)),
    factor(y_train, levels = c(0, 1)),
    positive = "1"
  )

  imp <- NULL
  if (!is.null(model_obj) && inherits(model_obj, "xgb.Booster")) {
    imp <- xgboost::xgb.importance(model = model_obj)
  }

  stats_test  <- calc_stats(y_test, probs, thresh)
  stats_train <- calc_stats(y_train, train_probs, thresh)

  new_entry <- data.frame(
    Model = mod_name,
    Timestamp = Sys.time(),
    Test_AUC = auc_val,
    Train_AUC = auc_train,
    Test_PRC = prc_val,
    Train_PRC = prc_train,
    Test_PRC_fold = prc_val / baseline_test,
    Train_PRC_fold = prc_train / baseline_train,
    Test_Sens = stats_test["sens"],
    Test_Spec = stats_test["spec"],
    Test_Prec = stats_test["prec"],
    Test_F1 = stats_test["f1"],
    Train_Sens = stats_train["sens"],
    Train_Spec = stats_train["spec"],
    Train_Prec = stats_train["prec"],
    Train_F1 = stats_train["f1"],
    Balance = balanced,
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
  global_metrics <<- rbind(global_metrics, new_entry)

  list(
    probs = probs,
    train_probs = train_probs,
    y_test = y_test,
    y_train = y_train,
    auc = auc_val,
    auc_train = auc_train,
    prc = prc_val,
    cm = cm_test,
    cm_train = cm_train,
    thresh = thresh,
    importance = imp,
    name = mod_name,
    model = model_obj
  )
}

# XGBoost trainer
run_xgb_pipeline <- function(X, y, protease_name, balanced = FALSE, force_retrain = FALSE) {
  message("XGBoost: ", protease_name, if (balanced) " [balanced]" else "")
  suffix <- if (balanced) "_balanced" else ""
  model_file <- paste0(gsub(" ", "_", protease_name), suffix, "_XGB.rds")

  set.seed(123)
  y <- as.integer(y)
  X <- as.data.frame(X)

  # Drop zero-variance columns once on the full matrix (keeps train/test aligned)
  vars <- vapply(X, function(col) {
    v <- stats::var(col, na.rm = TRUE)
    if (is.na(v)) 0 else v
  }, numeric(1))
  X <- X[, vars > 0, drop = FALSE]

  if (balanced) {
    pos_idx <- which(y == 1)
    neg_idx <- which(y == 0)
    n_pos <- length(pos_idx)
    if (length(neg_idx) < n_pos) {
      warning("Fewer negatives than positives; using all negatives.")
      sampled_neg <- neg_idx
    } else {
      sampled_neg <- sample(neg_idx, n_pos)
    }
    keep <- sample(c(pos_idx, sampled_neg))
    X <- X[keep, , drop = FALSE]
    y <- y[keep]
  }

  train_idx <- caret::createDataPartition(factor(y), p = 0.8, list = FALSE)[, 1]
  X_train <- as.matrix(X[train_idx, , drop = FALSE])
  X_test  <- as.matrix(X[-train_idx, , drop = FALSE])
  y_train <- y[train_idx]
  y_test  <- y[-train_idx]

  keep_cols <- colnames(X_train)[colSums(!is.na(X_train)) > 0]
  X_train <- X_train[, keep_cols, drop = FALSE]
  X_test  <- X_test[,  keep_cols, drop = FALSE]

  train_medians <- apply(X_train, 2, median, na.rm = TRUE)
  X_train <- impute_median(X_train, train_medians)
  X_test  <- impute_median(X_test, train_medians)

  dtrain <- xgboost::xgb.DMatrix(data = X_train, label = y_train)
  dtest  <- xgboost::xgb.DMatrix(data = X_test, label = y_test)

  params <- list(
    objective = "binary:logistic",
    eval_metric = "auc",
    eta = 0.01,
    max_depth = 6,
    subsample = 0.7,
    colsample_bytree = 0.7
  )

  if (!force_retrain && file.exists(model_file)) {
    message("Loading cached model: ", model_file)
    xgb_model <- readRDS(model_file)
  } else {
    message("Training XGBoost (", model_file, ")")
    xgb_model <- xgboost::xgb.train(
      params = params,
      data = dtrain,
      nrounds = 100,
      verbose = 0
    )
    saveRDS(xgb_model, model_file)
  }

  probs_test  <- predict(xgb_model, dtest)
  probs_train <- predict(xgb_model, dtrain)

  res <- get_metrics_xgb(
    probs_test, probs_train, y_test, y_train,
    paste0(protease_name, "_XGB", suffix),
    xgb_model,
    balanced = balanced
  )
  res$feature_names <- keep_cols
  res$train_medians <- train_medians
  res
}

plot_xgb_results <- function(res, name = "XGBoost") {
  roc_obj   <- pROC::roc(res$y_test, res$probs, quiet = TRUE)
  roc_train <- pROC::roc(res$y_train, res$train_probs, quiet = TRUE)

  p_roc <- ggplot2::ggplot() +
    ggplot2::geom_line(
      data = data.frame(f = 1 - roc_train$specificities, t = roc_train$sensitivities),
      ggplot2::aes(x = f, y = t), color = "steelblue", alpha = 0.25, linewidth = 1
    ) +
    ggplot2::geom_line(
      data = data.frame(f = 1 - roc_obj$specificities, t = roc_obj$sensitivities),
      ggplot2::aes(x = f, y = t), color = "steelblue", linewidth = 0.9
    ) +
    ggplot2::geom_abline(slope = 1, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey50") +
    ggplot2::annotate(
      "text", x = 0.55, y = 0.15,
      label = sprintf("Test AUC: %.3f\nTrain AUC: %.3f", res$auc, res$auc_train),
      size = 3.2, hjust = 0
    ) +
    ggplot2::labs(title = paste(name, "ROC"), x = "FPR", y = "TPR") +
    ggplot2::theme_bw()

  pr_df <- data.frame(prob = res$probs, obs = res$y_test) %>%
    dplyr::arrange(dplyr::desc(prob)) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(tpr = cumsum(obs) / sum(obs), prec = cumsum(obs) / dplyr::row_number())
  p_pr <- ggplot2::ggplot(pr_df, ggplot2::aes(x = tpr, y = prec)) +
    ggplot2::geom_line(color = "#b2182b", linewidth = 0.9) +
    ggplot2::annotate("text", x = 0.4, y = 0.2, label = sprintf("AUPRC: %.3f", res$prc), size = 3.2) +
    ggplot2::labs(title = "Precision–Recall", x = "Recall", y = "Precision") +
    ggplot2::theme_bw()

  cm_test_df  <- as.data.frame(res$cm$table) %>% dplyr::mutate(Dataset = "TEST")
  cm_train_df <- as.data.frame(res$cm_train$table) %>% dplyr::mutate(Dataset = "TRAIN")
  cm_combined <- rbind(cm_train_df, cm_test_df)
  cm_combined$Dataset <- factor(cm_combined$Dataset, levels = c("TRAIN", "TEST"))

  p_cm <- ggplot2::ggplot(cm_combined, ggplot2::aes(Prediction, Reference, fill = Freq)) +
    ggplot2::geom_tile() +
    ggplot2::geom_text(ggplot2::aes(label = Freq), color = "white", fontface = "bold", size = 3) +
    ggplot2::scale_fill_gradient(low = "#99ccff", high = "#003366") +
    ggplot2::facet_wrap(~Dataset, ncol = 1, scales = "free_y") +
    ggplot2::theme_minimal() +
    ggplot2::theme(legend.position = "none", strip.text = ggplot2::element_text(face = "bold")) +
    ggplot2::labs(title = "Confusion matrices")

  all_labels <- c(pwm_labels, struct_labeller)
  if (!is.null(res$importance) && nrow(res$importance) > 0) {
    plot_imp <- res$importance %>%
      dplyr::mutate(
        Label = ifelse(Feature %in% names(all_labels), all_labels[Feature], as.character(Feature))
      ) %>%
      dplyr::slice_max(order_by = Gain, n = 10, with_ties = FALSE)
    p_imp <- ggplot2::ggplot(plot_imp, ggplot2::aes(x = reorder(Label, Gain), y = Gain)) +
      ggplot2::geom_col(fill = "steelblue") +
      ggplot2::coord_flip() +
      ggplot2::labs(title = "Top features (Gain)", x = NULL, y = "Gain") +
      ggplot2::theme_bw()
  } else {
    p_imp <- ggplot2::ggplot() + ggplot2::theme_void() + ggplot2::labs(title = "No feature importance")
  }

  p_roc | p_pr | p_cm | p_imp
}
```

### Train per-protease XGBoost models

For each protease we load the raw / z / 0–1 cut-score tables, collapse identical 8-mer motifs among MEROPS sites, build a labeled feature matrix on MEROPS substrate proteins, and train an XGBoost model (plus a class-balanced counterpart for comparison).

Unbalanced models correspond to the full cut-site landscape (Appendix S17–S18); balanced models use 1:1 sampling (Appendix S11–S12, S16). Figures show ROC, PR, confusion matrices, and top Gain features.

```{r train-xgb, warning = FALSE}
global_metrics <- data.frame()
xgb_results <- list()
protease_tables <- list()

for (prot in proteases) {
  message("==== ", prot, " ====")
  tabs <- load_protease_tables(prot)
  protease_tables[[prot]] <- tabs

  df_model <- build_model_frame(tabs, df_cutsite)
  feats <- get_feature_matrix(df_model)
  message(sprintf(
    "%s: %d sites, %d positives (%.2f%%), %d features",
    prot, nrow(feats$X), sum(feats$y == 1), 100 * mean(feats$y == 1), ncol(feats$X)
  ))

  # Unbalanced
  res_u <- run_xgb_pipeline(feats$X, feats$y, prot, balanced = FALSE)
  save_fig(
    plot_xgb_results(res_u, paste(prot, "XGBoost")),
    paste0(gsub(" ", "_", prot), "_xgb_unbalanced"),
    width = 14, height = 5
  )

  # Balanced 1:1 subsample
  res_b <- run_xgb_pipeline(feats$X, feats$y, prot, balanced = TRUE)
  save_fig(
    plot_xgb_results(res_b, paste(prot, "XGBoost balanced")),
    paste0(gsub(" ", "_", prot), "_xgb_balanced"),
    width = 14, height = 5
  )

  xgb_results[[prot]] <- list(unbalanced = res_u, balanced = res_b, features = feats)
}
```

### Performance summary

Summarize train/test AUC, AUPRC, sensitivity, specificity, precision, and F1 across XGBoost runs:

```{r metrics-summary}
global_metrics2 <- global_metrics %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    AUC = sprintf("Te: %.3f (Tr: %.3f)", Test_AUC, Train_AUC),
    sensitivity = sprintf("Te: %.2f (Tr: %.2f)", Test_Sens, Train_Sens),
    specificity = sprintf("Te: %.2f (Tr: %.2f)", Test_Spec, Train_Spec),
    precision = sprintf("Te: %.2f (Tr: %.2f)", Test_Prec, Train_Prec),
    F1_Score = sprintf("Te: %.2f (Tr: %.2f)", Test_F1, Train_F1),
    PRC = sprintf("Te: %.3f (Tr: %.3f)", Test_PRC, Train_PRC),
    PRC_fold = sprintf("Te: %.3f (Tr: %.3f)", Test_PRC_fold, Train_PRC_fold)
  ) %>%
  dplyr::select(Model, Timestamp, Balance, AUC, sensitivity, specificity, precision, F1_Score, PRC, PRC_fold)

print(global_metrics2)
write.csv(global_metrics, "global_model_performance_metrics.csv", row.names = FALSE)
write.csv(global_metrics2, "global_model_performance_metrics2.csv", row.names = FALSE)
```

### Score full cut landscapes with trained models

Apply each protease’s unbalanced XGBoost model to all sites on MEROPS substrate proteins for that protease, rebuilding features with the same `prep_model_df` joins used at train time (so column names stay aligned).

Apply each unbalanced XGBoost model across that protease's scored landscape and export xgb_site_cleavage_probabilities.csv:

```{r apply-xgb-scores, warning = FALSE}
score_with_xgb <- function(prot, res, tables) {
  feat_names <- res$feature_names
  meds <- res$train_medians

  df_merops <- dedupe_similar_sites(tables$merops)
  df_raw_f <- tables$raw %>% dplyr::filter(uniprot %in% df_merops$uniprot)
  df_model <- prep_model_df(df_raw_f, tables$z, tables$o1, df_cutsite, df_merops)

  missing <- setdiff(feat_names, names(df_model))
  if (length(missing) > 0) {
    warning(prot, ": missing features filled with train median: ", paste(missing, collapse = ", "))
    for (m in missing) df_model[[m]] <- NA_real_
  }

  X <- as.matrix(df_model[, feat_names, drop = FALSE])
  X <- impute_median(X, meds[feat_names])
  dmat <- xgboost::xgb.DMatrix(data = X)
  probs <- predict(res$model, dmat)

  dplyr::tibble(
    uniprot = df_model$uniprot,
    pos = df_model$pos,
    protease = prot,
    cleaved = df_model$cleaved,
    cleavage_prob = probs
  )
}

scored_list <- lapply(proteases, function(prot) {
  score_with_xgb(prot, xgb_results[[prot]]$unbalanced, protease_tables[[prot]])
})
df_scored_all <- dplyr::bind_rows(scored_list)

p_score_dist <- ggplot2::ggplot(df_scored_all, ggplot2::aes(x = cleavage_prob, fill = protease)) +
  ggplot2::geom_density(alpha = 0.45) +
  ggplot2::facet_wrap(~protease, ncol = 1, scales = "free_y") +
  ggplot2::theme_bw() +
  ggplot2::labs(
    title = "XGBoost cleavage probabilities across scored sites",
    x = "Predicted P(cleaved)",
    y = "Density"
  ) +
  ggplot2::theme(legend.position = "none")
save_fig(p_score_dist, "xgb_cleavage_prob_distributions", width = 8, height = 6)

write.csv(df_scored_all, "xgb_site_cleavage_probabilities.csv", row.names = FALSE)
```
